ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prerequisite course (if any) */,
  "corequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corequisite course (if any) */,
  "theory_hours" INTEGER /* Number of theory hours for the course */,
  "practical_hours" INTEGER /* Number of practical or clinical hours for the course */,
  "total_hours" INTEGER /* Total number of hours for the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year in which the course is offered */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor teaching the course */,
  "syllabus_link" TEXT /* Link to the course syllabus */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  "is_elective" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the course is elective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES advisors ("advisor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_corequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("corequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "head_of_department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the head of the department */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the department was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Year of study (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment in the university */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the advisor of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES advisors ("advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advisors" (
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advisor */,
  "advisor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the advisor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the advisor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the advisor belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the advisor's office */,
  "appointment_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for student appointments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolling in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, dropped) */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* Final grade of the student in the course */,
  "dropout_reason" TEXT /* Reason for dropping out of the course (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class schedule */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being scheduled */,
  "classroom_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classroom where the class is held */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the class */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the class */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the class is held */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the class is scheduled */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year in which the class is scheduled */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor teaching the class */,
  "is_cancelled" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the class is cancelled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_schedules_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES advisors ("advisor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_schedules_classroom_id FOREIGN KEY ("classroom_id") REFERENCES classrooms ("classroom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_schedules_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classrooms" (
  "classroom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classroom */,
  "classroom_name" TEXT /* Name of the classroom */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building where the classroom is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the classroom */,
  "equipment_available" TEXT /* List of equipment available in the classroom */,
  "is_reserved" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the classroom is reserved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classroom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment being tracked */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class schedule being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the attendance record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the attendance (e.g., present, absent) */,
  "instructor_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the instructor regarding the student's attendance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES class_schedules ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment being graded */,
  "grade_type" TEXT /* Type of grade (e.g., midterm, final, project) */,
  "grade_value" REAL /* Value of the grade (e.g., 95.0) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the grade was recorded */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor who graded the student */,
  "grade_letter" TEXT /* Letter grade corresponding to the numeric grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES advisors ("advisor_id")
)
